name: Gryphon Capital Income Trust
analysis: GCI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.0486. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.0414 where 6 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.0486, stop A$1.9964, target A$2.0700. Risk/reward is 0.41:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
